function_v0.doc:
Verify an Ed25519 signature against a message hash and public key.

Called by the smart account contract's `__check_auth` when an
External signer backed by this verifier is used.

- `signature_payload`: The hash of the auth preimage (32 bytes).
- `key_data`: The 32-byte Ed25519 public key.
- `sig_data`: The 64-byte Ed25519 signature.
function_v0.name: verify

function_v0.doc: Returns the canonical byte representation of an Ed25519 public key.
function_v0.name: canonicalize_key

function_v0.doc: Canonicalizes a batch of Ed25519 public keys.
function_v0.name: batch_canonicalize_key
